name: Staff Productivity
query:
SELECT
  `tabEmployee`.`name` AS "Employee ID:Link/Employee:120",
  `tabEmployee`.`employee_name` AS "Employee Name:Data:200",
  `tabEmployee`.`designation` AS "Designation:Data:150",
  `tabEmployee`.`branch` AS "Branch:Link/Branch:120",
  COALESCE(`task_stats`.`completed_tasks`, 0) AS "Tasks Completed:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`task_stats`.`overdue_tasks`, 0) AS "Tasks Overdue:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`timesheet_stats`.`total_hours`, 0) AS "Hours Logged:Float:100",
  COALESCE(`project_stats`.`active_projects`, 0) AS "Active Projects:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`project_stats`.`completed_projects`, 0) AS "Completed Projects:Int:100"
FROM `tabEmployee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `custom_assigned_user` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) AS `completed_tasks`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` NOT IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled') AND `exp_end_date` < CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS `overdue_tasks`
  FROM `tabTask`
  GROUP BY `custom_assigned_user`
) `task_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `task_stats`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `tt`.`employee`,
    ROUND(SUM(`tt`.`hours`), 1) AS `total_hours`
  FROM `tabTimesheet Detail` `tt`
  JOIN `tabTimesheet` `t` ON `t`.`name` = `tt`.`parent`
  WHERE `t`.`docstatus` = 1
  AND `tt`.`hours` > 0
  GROUP BY `tt`.`employee`
) `timesheet_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `timesheet_stats`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `custom_engagement_manager` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'Active' THEN 1 END) AS `active_projects`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) AS `completed_projects`
  FROM `tabProject`
  WHERE `custom_engagement_manager` IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY `custom_engagement_manager`
) `project_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `project_stats`.`employee`
WHERE `tabEmployee`.`status` = 'Active'
ORDER BY `task_stats`.`completed_tasks` DESC
LIMIT 100
